channel.title: Industry Digest
channel.description: Weekly industry analysis and roundups across the AI ecosystem

item.title: Industry analysis: entity-resolution trends in 2026
item.description: An industry deep-dive into entity-resolution techniques being adopted across agent frameworks in 2026.

item.title: Voice agent framework comparison 2026
item.description: A side-by-side comparison of the leading voice agent frameworks across latency, cost, and developer ergonomics.

item.title: LangGraph 2.0 adds stateful agent primitives
item.description: LangGraph 2.0 introduces stateful agent primitives aimed at long-running agent workflows.

item.title: PydanticAI framework debuts
item.description: PydanticAI launched as a new typed-first agent framework from the Pydantic team.

item.title: Google Gemini 3 reaches general availability
item.description: Google confirmed Gemini 3 has reached general availability with expanded region coverage.

item.title: Adobe Firefly 4 launches across the Creative Cloud
item.description: Adobe rolled out Firefly 4 across the Creative Cloud suite with tighter integration into existing workflows.

item.title: Early thoughts on Anthropic's MCP draft
item.description: Early commentary on Anthropic's Model Context Protocol draft and what it implies for tool-augmented agents.
